Hotel and restaurant owners
have refused to sign up a new
scale of prices with the culinary
crafts. The scale presented by the
local unions of cooks, walters and
mattresses has been rejected and
the old agreement has been treat
ed In q similar manner The efil-
ployes of local restaurants and
members OF local unions generally
are expecting owners of the vart-
GUS restaurants to declare for an
open shop policy. and that the men
and women will be compelled to
fight to retain their union organize
ton and maintain present working
conditions.


1t is not expected that all local
restaurants will adopt the open
shop policy, as number Of own
ers of restaurants and hotels
are in sympathy with the working
class and want to see their ems
ployes receive enough pay to be
able to live decently. There are q
number of local restaurant men,
however, who are bitter in their
opposition to unions and are ex-
pacted to try to break up union
organizations.
